body:
not a problem

--- lesley taylor <klesleyt@hotmail.com> wrote:

> Hi Jeffrey.  I can not come in tomorrow because my

> they need to happen 
> because you are usually not around. ...and IF you
> are around, I am usually  
> able to come up with a "plan B", but tomorrow is
> just not workable.  I will 
> be in Tues. for sure.
> 
> thanks, les

not a problem

--- lesley taylor klesleyt@hotmail.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey. I can not come in tomorrow because my
nanny has to go to the
doctor in Brooklyn.. as well as I have an appt for
my son with his doctor.
I'm sorry. I usually plan things for a Monday if
they need to happen
because you are usually not around. ...and IF you
are around, I am usually
able to come up with a "plan B", but tomorrow is
just not workable. I will
be in Tues. for sure.

thanks, les
